result.preview:
"I attempted to identify businesses in Los Angeles, California, by querying the business_database table business_description using the MISC field (which stores location metadata as text in this PostgreSQL database) and then planned to join those results to the review_database (SQLite) to compute average ratings.

However, the business_description table does not appear to contain any records whose MISC field includes both "Los Angeles" and "California" (case-sensitive or case-insensitive); all such queries returned an empty result set. Without any businesses identified as being in Los Angeles, there is no way to restrict the reviews to that city and compute the requested ranking.

Because of this data limitation, I cannot determine the top 5 businesses in Los Angeles, California by average rating from the provided databases."
